AI Integration

Generate and maintain workflow guidance:

Prompt examples (MarkdownADRManager style):

Create a new ADR for [decision] using:
- filename ADR-NNNN-title-with-dashes.md
- front matter (title, date, status)
- sections: Status, Context, Options, Decision, Consequences

Review docs/adr and suggest which Proposed ADRs should be Accepted, with rationale.

Summarize decision history for [topic] citing ADR number and title.
